free_text: Proton scattering by even titanium isotopes.
Two semiconductor spectrometers with the energy
Self-supporting targets with the thickness of
0.65 mg/cm2 from separated titanium isotopes were used.
Uncertainty in relative cross section measurements was
on the average 4%, and in absolute cross section
measurements it was 8%. For some states of 46Ti and
50Ti the uncertainties increased up to 10 and 20%,
respectively due to the necessity of subtracting the
